indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON public.orders USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON public.orders USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_order_no_key ON public.orders USING btree (order_no)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX orders_pkey ON public.orders USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON public.users USING btree (name)
CREATE INDEX idx_users_status_created ON public.users USING btree (status, created_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_email_key ON public.users USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX users_pkey ON public.users USING btree (id)

requiredContext.sql: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
requiredContext.templateSql:
SELECT
            o.id,
            o.order_no,
            o.user_id,
            o.amount,
            o.status,
            o.created_at,
            u.name AS user_name,
            u.email AS user_email
        FROM orders o
        JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id
        <where>
            <if test="keyword != null and keyword != ''">
                AND (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
            </if>
            <if test="status != null and status != ''">
                AND o.status = #{status}
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
        LIMIT #{limit}
        OFFSET #{offset}

validCandidates.rewrittenSql: WITH filtered_users AS (SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN filtered_users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND o.status = #{status} UNION ALL SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND o.status = #{status} AND NOT (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.amount, o.status, o.created_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM orders o JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE (u.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND o.status = #{status} AND o.created_at < COALESCE((SELECT created_at FROM orders WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET #{offset}), '1970-01-01'::timestamp) ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
